title: Result Highlights

detail.title: Result Highlights
detail.short_info: RBSE Class 9, 11 Result 2026 will declare today on March 25. Check Rajasthan Board Class 9 and 11 results, download the marksheet using the roll number at rajshaladarpan.rajasthan.gov.in.

content.text: RBSE Class 9, 11 Result 2026 is being declared today on March 25, 2026. Students who appeared for the Rajasthan Board annual examinations can now check their marks using their roll number on the official portals. Keep your roll number handy and visit rajshaladarpan.rajasthan.gov.in or contact the school for quick access. Provisional marksheets will be available for download, while original ones will be issued by the respective schools.

rows: Downloadable PDF from school login or student portal

sections.heading: How to Check RBSE Class 9, 11 Result 2026?

items: Visit the official website: rajshaladarpan.rajasthan.gov.in or rajeduboard.rajasthan.gov.in.
Look for the “RBSE Class 9 Result 2026” or “RBSE Class 11 Result 2026” link on the homepage.
Enter your Roll Number and any other required details (such as school code or date of birth).
Click on Submit or View Result.
Your marksheet will appear on the screen — verify all details.
Download the PDF and take a printout for future reference.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on the RBSE Marksheet

items: Student’s Full Name
Roll Number
School Name and Code
Subject-wise Marks (Theory + Practical, if applicable)
Total Marks and Percentage
Result Status (Pass / Fail / Compartment)
Grade or Division (if applicable)
Remarks (if any)

sections.heading: What to Do After Checking the Result?

items: Carefully verify all personal and marks details on the downloaded marksheet.
Contact your school immediately if you find any discrepancy for correction.
Save a soft copy (PDF) and get a printed hard copy.
Attend the Parent Teacher Meeting (PTM) scheduled today for official guidance.
Follow school instructions for using the result in the new academic session starting April 1, 2026.

seo_tags: RBSE Result Check by Roll Number
